description: Perform a corporate acquisition data migration in the 'demodb' database using OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html) with credentials root/GymAnything123!. The luxury hospitality group 'The Collections' has acquired all hotels of Type 'Boutique'. Update the database to reflect this change by creating a 'Brands' vertex class, a 'BelongsTo' edge class, and a Brand vertex named 'The Collections'. For all hotels currently identified as Type 'Boutique', update their Type to 'Luxury Collection', append ' - The Collections' to their Name, and create a 'BelongsTo' edge linking the Hotel to 'The Collections' Brand vertex.
